name: Roasted Cornish Game Hens Marinated in Honey and Mustard
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon dried thyme or 1 tablespoon chopped fresh thyme
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the honey, mustard, garlic, 3 tablespoons of oil, thyme, and cinnamon.
2. Remove the wing tips from the hens.
3. Roll the hens in the marinade and marinate overnight.
4. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees F (232 degrees C).
5. Season the birds inside and out with salt and pepper. Cut the lemon into halves and squeeze over each bird. Put a used lemon half in the cavity of each bird.
6. Place a rack in a roasting pan and brush the rack with several tablespoons of vegetable oil.
7. Place the birds, breast side down on the oiled rack.
8. Roast for 30 minutes.
9. Turn the birds breast side up, reduce the heat to 350 degrees F (177 degrees C), and roast an additional 15 to 20 minutes or until the hens are cooked through and the skin is brown.
10. Allow the hens to rest 10 minutes before serving.
Yield: 2 to 4 servings
